components.value: V, S, M/DF (a small piece of a map)

area.value: The caster and all allies within a 30-ft.-radius burst, centered on the caster

description.value: Tactical acumen grants you and your allies a mastery of battlefield tactics. Whenever you would gain a bonus on attack rolls or to AC due to battlefield position, such as flanking, higher ground, or cover, you gain an additional +1 insight bonus. This bonus increases by +1 for every five caster levels above 5th you possess (maximum +4). Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game Ultimate Combat.
